examples: The proposal has provoked howls of Gallic indignation.
And so, with a Gallic shrug, Carrefour is closing up shop in much of South-East Asia.
The region itself now produces for other international labels, like for the Gallic giant Lacose.
So why are these advanced Gallic palates not being put to use for coffee?
French designers were mortified -- such a quintessentially Gallic symbol in the hands of a foreigner.
